offer: For bookkeepers managing 5–15 clients using QuickBooks, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate accounts receivable reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual reconciliation processes are time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for bookkeepers seeking solutions
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar challenges
Direct message outreach to bookkeepers with demo video
Participate in community forums for bookkeeping tools
try_it: Let users experience user-friendly interface for manual entry and reporting
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showcasing manual-first workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy reuse
Set default reminder schedules for tasks
Enable CSV import for existing client data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
